steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes Dorian’s immediate physical and emotional reaction to the portrait—“cheeks flushed with pleasure,” a “look of joy,” and the sense of beauty as a “revelation.” This unambiguous sequence of positive reactions is the decisive clue.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: B aligns because the text explicitly conveys Dorian’s delight. The other choices either miss the emotional reaction entirely (C), fabricate unsupported motives (A, D), or address irrelevant details. That matches choice B — B is correct.
